_comment: This is NOT a full package.json to drop in — react-native init generates one with the correct RN version, scripts, and metro/jest config for whatever RN release is current. Add the dependencies and devDependencies below to the generated file instead of overwriting it.
install_command: npm install @react-navigation/native @react-navigation/native-stack react-native-screens react-native-safe-area-context react-native-url-polyfill axios react-native-nfc-passport-info
